stemHtml: Prior to departure, de-icing/anti-icing fluid has been applied to a commercial airliner. After the procedure is completed, what should the commander consider?

options.a: The holdover time will expire immediately after take-off, as soon as snow falls on the wings.
options.b: That the passengers should be informed once the procedure has been completed.
options.c: Weather conditions and what type of fluid has been used, as anti icing will be ineffective when its snowing.
options.d: That the aeroplane should take off during the holdover time.
